org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie.storage.CompactionEntryLog

Packages that use CompactionEntryLog
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie
Provides a Bookie server that stores entries for clients.
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie.storage
Provides a Bookie server that stores entries for clients.
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie.storage.directentrylogger
Support for bookie entry logs using Direct IO.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<CompactionEntryLog>
    EntryLogger.incompleteCompactionLogs()
    Return a collection of all the compaction entry logs which have been compacted, but have not been cleaned up.
